title: Calamari blessing pot
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Calamari blessing pot''' was a pot where [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] offered their blessings. [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] gave [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] one at their [[Wedding of Han Solo and Leia Organa/Legends|wedding]]. Leia considered it to be ugly and wanted to smash it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2015-11-12 -->''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''
